data.raceComments: {"comment":"The time-honoured Wellington Boot for juveniles has always been a good race, and this edition is no different. 1. BAR JESTER is a very progressive gelding who has had 3 starts all at Canberra, and he was brave in defeat when running fourth in the G3 Black Opal there 5 weeks ago. If he has some luck from his nasty draw, then he can grab a piece of the top 3 here. 7. HELLENIC BELLE made her debut in the G3 Magic Night at Rosehill, and then was too good at Muswellbrook 16 days ago, scoring by half a length after receiving the run of the race. She drops 2kg, and still has more to offer. Each way. 9. I'M A BEAUT franked some solid trial form by demolishing her rivals on debut at Dubbo by 4 lengths. She has the coveted pole position and is likely to settle a tad closer this time. Stick with her. 5. BETTER OFF ALONE was runner-up behind the second pick in the same race, and she had won a trial easily before that. She cops a tricky gate, but Bjorn Baker will have her spot on for this.","runners":[1,7,9,5],"exclusive":true}
